- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
- [x] Scaffold the Project
- [x] Customize the Project
- [x] Install Required Extensions
- [x] Compile the Project
- [x] Create and Run Task
- [ ] Launch the Project
- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete

- Project: Vite + React + TypeScript mobile workout tracker.
- Requirements fixed up front: Russian UI, phone-first layout, local browser storage, week switching, weights, completion marks, history, GitHub Pages deployment.
- Scaffold was created manually in the current root because the autogenerated Vite command became interactive after the workspace stopped being empty.
- Customization included the first mobile MVP, seeded training data, local persistence, and history UI.
- No extensions were required by project setup info.
- Build validation passed with npm run build.
- VS Code task was created and the Vite dev server starts successfully.
- README and deployment workflow were added and kept in sync with the current project state.
- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
